name: Susan's Easy Salsa Perfecta
recipeIngredient: (Not necessary to roast, but extra delicious if you do. Just turn the peppers over a hot burner until skins turn black and blister. Peel most of them off as soon as they're slightly cool, but don't be overly fussy. The little black bits make the salsa look and taste just like the best restaurants.)
1 28-oz can Progresso Tomatoes (don't drain; use the juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pulse the first three ingredients together briefly.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and pulse until combined.
3. Enjoy.
